queries.question: In what year did the hotel with the highest rate open?
queries.sql: select Opening_Year from Hotels Join Rooms on Rooms.HotelID = Hotels.HotelID order by Rooms.Rate DESC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?opening_year WHERE {
  ?hotels a :Hotels .
  ?rooms a :Rooms .
  ?rooms p:hasHotels ?hotels .
  ?hotels p:Opening_Year ?opening_year .
  ?rooms p:Rate ?rate_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?rate_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: List the year and month of the opening of the hotel with a sea view.
queries.sql: select Opening_Year, Opening_Month from Hotels Join Rooms on Rooms.HotelID = Hotels.HotelID where Rooms.Type = 'Sea View'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?opening_year ?opening_month WHERE {
  ?hotels a :Hotels .
  ?rooms a :Rooms .
  ?rooms p:hasHotels ?hotels .
  ?hotels p:Opening_Year ?opening_year .
  ?hotels p:Opening_Month ?opening_month .
  ?rooms p:Type ?type_f .
  FILTER(STR(?type_f) = "Sea View")
}
